concepts.name: Vector Space
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors with addition and scalar multiplication operations.

concepts.name: Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: A function between vector spaces preserving vector addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A rectangular array of numbers or symbols.

concepts.name: Matrix Multiplication
concepts.short_definition: The operation of multiplying two matrices.

concepts.name: Square Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix with the same number of rows and columns.

concepts.name: Identity Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with ones on the main diagonal and zeros elsewhere.

concepts.name: Determinant
concepts.short_definition: A scalar value computed from a square matrix.

concepts.name: Characteristic Polynomial
concepts.short_definition: A polynomial associated with a square matrix, used to find eigenvalues.

concepts.name: Eigenvalue
concepts.short_definition: A scalar that describes how an eigenvector is scaled by a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Eigenvector
concepts.short_definition: A non-zero vector that does not change direction when a linear transformation is applied.

concepts.name: Eigen Decomposition
concepts.short_definition: Factoring a matrix into a product of its eigenvectors and eigenvalues.

concepts.name: Eigenspace
concepts.short_definition: The set of all eigenvectors corresponding to a particular eigenvalue, plus the zero vector.

concepts.name: Diagonalization
concepts.short_definition: Transforming a matrix into a diagonal matrix using similarity transformations.

concepts.name: Similarity Transformation
concepts.short_definition: Multiplying a matrix by an invertible matrix and its inverse.

concepts.name: Invertible Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix that has a multiplicative inverse.

concepts.name: Null Space
concepts.short_definition: The set of all vectors that a linear transformation maps to the zero vector.

concepts.name: Eigenvalue Equation
concepts.short_definition: The fundamental equation defining eigenvalues and eigenvectors.

concepts.name: Scalar Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A diagonal matrix where all diagonal entries are the same scalar.

concepts.name: Geometric Multiplicity
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the eigenspace for a given eigenvalue.

concepts.name: Algebraic Multiplicity
concepts.short_definition: The multiplicity of an eigenvalue as a root of the characteristic polynomial.

concepts.name: Trace
concepts.short_definition: The sum of the diagonal elements of a square matrix.

concepts.name: Eigenvalue Properties
concepts.short_definition: Relationships between eigenvalues and matrix properties like trace and determinant.

concepts.name: Symmetric Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix that is equal to its transpose.

concepts.name: Real Eigenvalues
concepts.short_definition: Eigenvalues that are real numbers.

concepts.name: Orthogonal Eigenvectors
concepts.short_definition: Eigenvectors corresponding to distinct eigenvalues of a symmetric matrix.

concepts.name: Change of Basis
concepts.short_definition: Representing vectors and transformations in a different set of basis vectors.

concepts.name: Matrix Representation
concepts.short_definition: Expressing a linear transformation as a matrix with respect to a chosen basis.

concepts.name: Eigenvalue Problem
concepts.short_definition: The task of finding the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a matrix.

concepts.name: Singular Value Decomposition
concepts.short_definition: A factorization of a matrix into three other matrices.

concepts.name: Principal Component Analysis
concepts.short_definition: A dimensionality reduction technique using eigenvalues of the covariance matrix.

concepts.name: Covariance Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix showing the covariance between pairs of variables.

concepts.name: Spectral Theorem
concepts.short_definition: A theorem relating eigenvalues and eigenvectors to matrix properties, especially for symmetric matrices.

concepts.name: Generalized Eigenvalue Problem
concepts.short_definition: An extension of the standard eigenvalue problem involving two matrices.

concepts.name: Jordan Normal Form
concepts.short_definition: A matrix representation for linear transformations that are not diagonalizable.

concepts.name: Cayley-Hamilton Theorem
concepts.short_definition: States that every square matrix satisfies its own characteristic equation.

concepts.name: Matrix Exponential
concepts.short_definition: The matrix analogue of the exponential function.

concepts.name: Differential Equations
concepts.short_definition: Equations involving derivatives of functions.

concepts.name: System of Linear Equations
concepts.short_definition: A collection of linear equations.

concepts.name: Rank
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the vector space spanned by the columns or rows of a matrix.
